title: Codex 2026 Prompting and Repository Practice · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Apply current Codex guidance across CLI, IDE, app, planning, and repository instructions. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a Codex-specific prompt and AGENTS.md package after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use goal, context, constraints, and done conditions for material coding work.
Use Plan mode or an interview when requirements are fuzzy or choices are consequential.
Place recurring build, test, lint, review, and boundary guidance in the nearest applicable AGENTS.md.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prompt Codex to test, inspect the diff, review risk, and report evidence before completion.
